message:
test(mcp): add 22 unit tests for mcp_middleware format negotiation

Cover: McpOutputFormat default, parse_mcp_output_format (json/toon/
case-insensitive/whitespace/invalid), extract_mcp_output_format
(missing/present/removes-key/error cases), augment_tool_schema_with_format
(adds/preserves/creates/noop), encode_mcp_contents (json passthrough/
toon conversion/invalid json error/empty).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
